coach_notes: The most critical gaps are classroom management, lesson planning, and early childhood education, as these are foundational skills for roles in education or childcare that appear in the job postings. Without them, you cannot effectively lead a classroom or design curriculum, which are core responsibilities. To address this, consider taking a short online course in early childhood education or volunteering to assist in a classroom to gain hands-on experience.
